# kUSBReEnumerateCaptureDeviceMask

**Enumeration Case**

The mask to capture the device.

## Declaration

```swift
kUSBReEnumerateCaptureDeviceMask = ( 1 << kUSBReEnumerateCaptureDeviceBit)
```
